title: clojure.java-time dependency declared but unused
evidence: deps.edn:5 declares clojure.java-time/clojure.java-time {:mvn/version "1.4.2"} but data.clj uses java.time.LocalDate and java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter directly via interop
suggestion: Remove the unused dependency or use the clojure.java-time wrapper functions for consistency

title: 16 MCP tools implemented — exceeds required minimum
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/server.clj:13-137 defines 16 tools including extras: find_brazilian_players, top_players_at_club, get_season_winner, best_home_records, top_scoring_teams
suggestion: No action needed — good coverage beyond spec

title: Robust team name normalization handles all Brazilian state suffixes
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:29-45 normalize-team-name validates against 27 state codes; test/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_test.clj:9-22 tests edge cases
suggestion: Addresses TASK.md data quality concern about team name variations

title: Multi-format date parsing (ISO, ISO datetime, Brazilian DD/MM/YYYY)
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:70-86 parse-date with 3 format branches; test/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_test.clj:38-56 tests all formats
suggestion: Addresses TASK.md data quality concern about date format variations
